before_text: On DomainQA, RadarNet improves exact match from 61.2% to 68.7% over BM25 under unseen-domain evaluation.
after_text: On DomainQA, RadarNet improves exact match from 61.2% to 68.7% over BM25 under unseen-domain evaluation. A concurrent reproduction reports a lower RadarNet result under nominally matched conditions, so this gain may depend on implementation details and should be interpreted within the evaluated setup [source-01].
assertions_added: A concurrent reproduction reports a lower result under nominally matched conditions.
rationale: Add the smallest boundary statement supported by the confirmed challenge.

before_text: Our calibrated abstention rule lowers unsupported-answer rate from 14.8% to 6.1% on ShiftBench.
after_text: Our calibrated abstention rule lowers unsupported-answer rate from 14.8% to 6.1% on ShiftBench. However, a matched reassessment observes a smaller reduction, indicating sensitivity to calibration details [source-04].
assertions_added: A matched reassessment observes a smaller reduction.
rationale: Surface the confirmed conflicting result without changing locked numbers.

before_text: Our evaluation protocol follows the CleanEval benchmark and uses its released relevance judgments.
after_text: Our evaluation protocol follows the CleanEval benchmark and uses its released relevance judgments. Because those judgments are subject to a retraction notice, all affected results require revalidation before the next manuscript release [source-07].
assertions_added: The relevance judgments are subject to a retraction notice.
rationale: Record the confirmed integrity event and an explicit revalidation requirement.
